summary: Iteration 56: Tested Serial Numbers Management module. All backend APIs (20/20 tests) and frontend UI features working correctly. Page loads with 979 serial numbers, 221 unmapped. All CRUD operations, filters, and dialogs functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Legacy serial numbers with invalid names like 'already dispatched', 'cancel order', 'NA' exist in database - consider data cleanup
221 unmapped serials need SKU mapping for proper inventory tracking
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 979 serial numbers in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Serial Numbers Management module fully tested. Database has 979 serials (2 in_stock, 977 dispatched, 0 returned, 221 unmapped). All APIs working: GET /serial-numbers/management, PUT /serial-numbers/{id}/update, PUT /serial-numbers/{id}/map-sku, POST /serial-numbers/bulk-map-sku, DELETE /serial-numbers/{id}, POST /serial-numbers/swap

serial_numbers_management_page.details: Page loads correctly with stats cards (Total: 979, In Stock: 2, Dispatched: 977, Returned: 0, No SKU: 221, Alerts: 977)

filters.details: All filters working: SKU dropdown, Firm dropdown, Status dropdown, Search input, Unmapped Only toggle

edit_dialog.details: Edit dialog opens with all editable fields: Status, Customer Name, Phone, Order ID, Address, Notes. Save Changes button functional

map_sku_dialog.details: Map SKU dialog opens for unmapped serials with Master SKU dropdown selector

bulk_map_dialog.details: Bulk Map dialog shows count of unmapped serials (221) with list preview and SKU selector

delete_dialog.details: Delete confirmation dialog shows serial number and warning message. Correctly prevents deletion of dispatched serials

swap_dialog.details: Swap dialog shows Serial 1 info and dropdown to select Serial 2 for swapping

api_get_management.details: GET /api/serial-numbers/management returns serials, alerts, summary with unmapped_count

api_update.details: PUT /api/serial-numbers/{id}/update accepts and saves customer fields (name, phone, order_id, address, notes)

api_map_sku.details: PUT /api/serial-numbers/{id}/map-sku maps serial to Master SKU

api_bulk_map.details: POST /api/serial-numbers/bulk-map-sku bulk maps multiple serials to SKU

api_delete.details: DELETE /api/serial-numbers/{id} deletes serial (blocked for dispatched status)

api_swap.details: POST /api/serial-numbers/swap endpoint exists and responds correctly

authentication.details: All endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)
